programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Zoo staff embark on an ambitious, year-long undertaking in an effort to help Naomi the chimpanzee overcome a complicated medical condition in the hope of finally becoming a mother.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Taronga Zoo's new African Savannah Precinct welcomes its residents.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Two squirrel monkeys arrive in Taronga with a clear goal, to mate with as many females as possible; it all ends with a broken jaw and a visit to the hospital; Keeper Jordan talks about his special bond with a cheetah.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo prevents the use of leg traps and teaches the trapper responsible not to underestimate animal cunning.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo comes to the aid of a freighter captain when his crew steals the pearls he is transporting back to their owner.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Injured koala Malakai enters the zoo's breeding program; a baby crocodile enjoys some treats; a lesser-known Australian marsupial gets a second chance.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Keeper Caroline notices that Nele's eyes have clouded over and becomes concerned, ordering an examination.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Time is the enemy as big fish eat up the quota and paychecks hang in the balance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Hobo prevents the use of leg traps and teaches the trapper responsible not to underestimate animal cunning.

programme.desc: Hobo comes to the aid of a freighter captain when his crew steals the pearls he is transporting back to their owner.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril tries to catch a Nile perch, one of the world's biggest freshwater fish.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Researchers try to collect venom from a 500-pound, freshwater stingray with a dagger-like barb.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Deep in the dark waters of the Amazon jungle lives a fanged creature of nightmares.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril's attempt to find a brutal fish called a cubera.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A 1,400-pound blue fin tuna is a true titan prowling the oceans.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: The wild coast of South Africa is known for its deadly shark attacks.

programme.desc: Fishing enthusiast and adventurer Cyril Chauquet seeks out dangerous creatures in remote corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at what it takes to run the Taronga Zoo Sydney, Australia's largest zoo, located on the shores of Sydney Harbour.

programme.title: My Pet Ate What?
programme.desc: Dr. G investigates an elderly Siamese cat with worrisome sniffles. A serial foreign body offender lands on Dr. Heather Suttie's case list. A sassy mini pony with an insatiable appetite deals the Westwinds Mobile Veterinary Services team a hidden surprise.

programme.title: My Pet Ate What?
programme.desc: Dr. G tackles a barbecue gobble that has more than a kernel of risk. Dr. Heather Suttie faces a potentially toxic situation when a cat goes way beyond a recommended dose. Westwinds Mobile Veterinary Services expands the scope of their large animal horse care.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.sub-title: No Nut is a Good Nut
programme.desc: The team travels to Ebb and Flow First Nation; Dr. Keri conducts her marathon spay and neuter clinics.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Keri and her horse train for the Cowtown Derby in Claresholm, Alberta; Dr. Keri castrates a feisty stallion.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: A healthy bull's fancy turns towards a little cow courtship as Dr. Keri makes house calls to assess health and virility that are vital to life on the farm; Jenna has a close call with the most ornery bull in the bunch.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Unwanted stray dogs roam in packs and can be a dangerous threat; rescue groups bring dogs to Dr. Keri, in the city and on reserves, saving thousands of lives.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.sub-title: No Nut is a Good Nut
programme.desc: The team travels to Ebb and Flow First Nation; Dr. Keri conducts her marathon spay and neuter clinics.

programme.desc: Keri and her horse train for the Cowtown Derby in Claresholm, Alberta; Dr. Keri castrates a feisty stallion.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A fairground owner's life is threatened by a mysterious stranger.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo joins a dangerous investigation of several animal disappearances at a zoo.

programme.desc: A healthy bull's fancy turns towards a little cow courtship as Dr. Keri makes house calls to assess health and virility that are vital to life on the farm; Jenna has a close call with the most ornery bull in the bunch.

programme.title: Wild Fish
programme.desc: Time is running out as the team must return to the Fraser River to find and tag the 300-pound giant white sturgeon they are looking for; ...

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A violent attack happened to a tribesman in the Bolivian jungle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Biggest & Baddest
programme.desc: One of the largest, heaviest birds in the world, the cassowary is territorial with a reputation for killing people; in Queensland, Niall discovers a small group of cassowaries clinging to life after human development destroyed its environment.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Following the journey of an underweight and vulnerable little penguin through her progression from tiny to mighty; Brian and Security Steve determine what triggered the monitoring systems that protect Taronga's fence lines.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: After Dr. Keri's ultrasound indicates that the Sheltie, Mimic, is pregnant, the show follows the puppies' progress from birth to four weeks old.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Breeder Kerry Nemet prepares a litter of Shetland Sheepdog puppies for their future lives.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: In the Pilbara region, the Ferals hit a run of nuggets that could transform their season; the Gold Retrievers are rocked by a medical emergency.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew's mine site is swamped after a brutal storm; Ryan collapses in a deadly heatwave; Russell and Shane uncover a big nugget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The fleet looks to prevent the Fishin' Frenzy from securing its fifth title.
